message:
test(ntm-driver): add zombie detection tests

- Add comprehensive test suite for NTM driver zombie agent detection
- Test consecutive error tracking and threshold-based failures
- Test event emission (error + terminated) on agent failure
- Test poll interval cleanup when agent marked as failed

Tests for bd-3g28 (implementation already in 3050a60)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
